description: Track what competitors ship each week from Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-aware clients. Wraps the Meertrack v1 competitive-intelligence API.

auth.instructions: Mint a production API key (mt_live_…) at Settings → API Keys in the Meertrack app. Send it as `Authorization: Bearer mt_live_…` for the hosted endpoint, or `MEERTRACK_API_KEY` env var for the local stdio package.

features: 8 read-only tools mapping 1:1 to the Meertrack v1 REST endpoints
Local stdio (npx) and hosted Streamable HTTP transports, both shipped day 1
Per-request bearer forwarding — the hosted server stores no credentials
Cursor-based pagination and rate-limit reset surfaced through to the agent
